query: prioritize sse onboarding snippets with optional stdio tabs and richer dashboard copy UX

results.title: Phase 4.1 docs refreshed
results.content: Updated README.md, docs/guides/local-setup.md, docs/guides/admin-client-onboarding.md, and docs/requirements/p4_1_dashboard_setup_and_direct_auth.md to reflect the completed Phase 4.1 flow: browser-first setup via /setup, one-time setup-complete API key reveal, browser admin login, direct SSE client-key auth, stdio bootstrap via MINDER_CLIENT_API_KEY, and admin API-key recovery. Added operator flow guidance and marked the Phase 4.1 requirement doc as implemented. Commit: aeaa3ca.

results.title: Phase 4.3 completed with console serving seam
results.content: Completed Phase 4.3 without creating a commit. Added dashboard config for base_path/static_dir/legacy_compat_enabled, served built dashboard assets under /console, redirected legacy setup/login/dashboard GET routes to /console equivalents when compatibility is disabled, and added tests/integration/test_phase4_3_console_gate.py. Focused verification now passes for architecture extraction, admin use cases, Astro scaffold, HTTP admin routes, setup/login flows, and console static serving. Broader Phase 4 remains open for observability and production hardening.

results.title: Astro dashboard UX refinement
results.content: Refined the Astro admin console UX by making onboarding snippets full-width readable cards with copy buttons, keeping connection-test and key-lifecycle failures inline instead of redirecting away on 401, and switching the header from a global Setup/Login/Clients button set to contextual per-page navigation. Also updated the frontend API client to surface backend error messages instead of generic status-only errors.

results.title: Minder MCP onboarding snippets aligned to client-native formats
results.content: Updated src/minder/application/admin/use_cases.py and related tests/docs so dashboard onboarding now emits official client-native snippets: Codex uses stdio config.toml with MINDER_CLIENT_API_KEY, Copilot CLI uses mcp-config.json with type=sse, Antigravity uses stdio mcp_config.json, and Claude Code uses .mcp.json with type=sse. Also updated dashboard snippet titles and admin onboarding guide.

results.title: Phase 4.1 requirements refined for setup and direct auth
results.content: Reviewed and rewrote docs/requirements/p4_1_dashboard_setup_and_direct_auth.md to align with Minder's actual auth model. Key correction: admin auth remains API-key based, so the requirements now target first-run /setup, admin API-key recovery via CLI, and direct client_api_key parity across transports instead of inventing password auth. The doc now distinguishes current baseline capabilities already present in code (/dashboard/login browser flow, SSE X-Minder-Client-Key, token exchange, onboarding routes) from the remaining gaps to implement. It also preserves token exchange as a supported compatibility path and records open questions around stdio bootstrap shape, session invalidation on recovery, and whether first-admin setup needs an extra deployment secret.
